targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Hosts" FROM mv_vmware_host_latest WHERE 1=1
AND ('$host' = '' OR host_name IN ($host))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Connected" FROM mv_vmware_host_latest WHERE connection_state = 'connected'
AND ('$host' = '' OR host_name IN ($host))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Maintenance" FROM mv_vmware_host_latest WHERE in_maintenance_mode = TRUE
AND ('$host' = '' OR host_name IN ($host))

SELECT m.collection_timestamp AS time, h.name AS metric, m.cpu_utilization_avg_percent AS "CPU %"
FROM vmware_host_metrics m
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_host h ON m.vcenter_uuid::text = h.vcenter_uuid::text AND m.host_moid = h.component_moid
WHERE m.collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$host' = '' OR h.name IN ($host))
ORDER BY time

SELECT m.collection_timestamp AS time, h.name AS metric, m.mem_usage_avg_percent AS "Memory %"
FROM vmware_host_metrics m
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_host h ON m.vcenter_uuid::text = h.vcenter_uuid::text AND m.host_moid = h.component_moid
WHERE m.collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$host' = '' OR h.name IN ($host))
ORDER BY time

SELECT p.collection_timestamp AS time, p.hostname AS metric, p.power_avg_watts AS "Power (W)"
FROM vmware_host_power p
WHERE p.collection_timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ('$host' = '' OR p.hostname IN ($host))
ORDER BY time

SELECT inv.host_name AS host_name, COALESCE(m.cpu_utilization_avg_percent, 0) AS "CPU %"
FROM mv_vmware_host_latest inv
LEFT JOIN vmware_host_metrics m ON m.vcenter_uuid = inv.vcenter_uuid AND m.host_moid = inv.host_moid
  AND m.collection_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(collection_timestamp) FROM raw_vmware_host_perf_agg)
WHERE ('$host' = '' OR inv.host_name IN ($host))
ORDER BY "CPU %" DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

SELECT inv.vcenter_name AS "vCenter", inv.datacenter_name AS "Datacenter", inv.cluster_name AS "Cluster",
  inv.host_name AS "Host", inv.connection_state AS "State", inv.in_maintenance_mode AS "Maintenance",
  inv.total_cpu_ghz AS "CPU (GHz)", inv.memory_gb AS "Mem (GB)",
  m.cpu_utilization_avg_percent AS "CPU %", m.mem_usage_avg_percent AS "Mem %"
FROM mv_vmware_host_latest inv
LEFT JOIN vmware_host_metrics m ON m.vcenter_uuid = inv.vcenter_uuid AND m.host_moid = inv.host_moid
  AND m.collection_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(collection_timestamp) FROM raw_vmware_host_perf_agg)
WHERE ('$host' = '' OR inv.host_name IN ($host))
ORDER BY inv.vcenter_name, inv.datacenter_name, inv.cluster_name, inv.host_name

list.label: vCenter
list.name: vcenter
list.query: SELECT name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter ORDER BY name

list.label: Datacenter
list.name: datacenter
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT dc.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON dc.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
WHERE '$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Location
list.name: location
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT SPLIT_PART(cl.name, '-', 1) FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Cluster
list.name: cluster
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT cl.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
AND ('$location' = '' OR SPLIT_PART(cl.name, '-', 1) IN ($location))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Host
list.name: host
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT h.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_host h
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON h.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl ON h.vcenter_uuid::text = cl.vcenter_uuid::text AND h.parent_component_moid = cl.component_moid
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
AND ('$cluster' = '' OR cl.name IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY 1
